_description: Anthropic Claude 3.5 Haiku (claude-3-5-haiku-20241022). Fastest and most cost-effective Claude model. 200K context with strong tool calling for high-throughput tasks. Best for rapid iteration, simple tool use, classification, and cost-sensitive workloads where latency matters.

tool_calling._comment: Haiku 3.5 supports parallel tool use with very low latency. Great for high-volume tool calling.

extended_thinking._comment: Extended thinking not available on Haiku 3.5. Use Sonnet 4.6 or Opus 4.6 for thinking mode.

dynamic_temperature._comment: Anthropic API handles temperature differently. Default temp=1.0 is recommended.

tool_call_batching.system_prompt_suffix: When multiple tools are needed, call ALL of them in a single response. Do not call one tool and wait - emit all tool calls together.
tool_call_batching._comment: Haiku 3.5 supports parallel tool calls with sub-second latency.

pricing._comment: As of 2025. Extremely cost-effective. ~19x cheaper than Opus 4.6 on input.

rate_limits._comment: Highest throughput of all Claude models. Designed for high-volume use cases.

running_config.description: Anthropic hosted API. Requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable.
